pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target version from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against JDK 17 APIs, potentially missing JDK 21 features or failing strict JDK 21 compliance checks if the build environment enforces the target version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 4.0.3 as the parent POM to manage dependencies and build configuration for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4.x is required for JDK 21 support; using an older parent would result in incompatibility or lack of support for the new JDK features.
